div.style: width: 260px; background: #1e1e2e; border-right: 1px solid #313244; overflow-y: auto;

div.class: d-flex align-items-center px-2 py-1 rounded cursor-pointer mb-1

div.style: color: #f9e2af; font-size: 10px; padding-left: 18px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;

div.class: d-flex align-items-center px-2 py-1 rounded cursor-pointer mb-1

div.style: color: #f9e2af; font-size: 10px; padding-left: 18px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;

div.class: d-flex align-items-center px-2 py-1 rounded cursor-pointer mb-1

div.style: color: #f9e2af; font-size: 10px; padding-left: 18px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;

t.p: No commit history available. Sync branches from project settings.

div.style: background: #11111b; border-radius: 6px; overflow-x: auto; border: 1px solid #313244;

table.style: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.5;

tr.t-att-style: line.startsWith('+') and !line.startsWith('+++') ? 'background: rgba(166,227,161,0.1);' : line.startsWith('-') and !line.startsWith('---') ? 'background: rgba(243,139,168,0.1);' : line.startsWith('@@') ? 'background: rgba(137,180,250,0.08);' : ''

td.style: padding: 0 8px; text-align: right; user-select: none; min-width: 40px; color: #45475a; border-right: 1px solid #313244;

td.t-att-style: 'color:' + (line.startsWith('+') and !line.startsWith('+++') ? '#a6e3a1' : line.startsWith('-') and !line.startsWith('---') ? '#f38ba8' : line.startsWith('@@') ? '#89b4fa' : line.startsWith('diff ') or line.startsWith('index ') ? '#6c7086' : '#cdd6f4')

div.style: width: 260px; min-width: 260px; background: #11111b; border-right: 1px solid #313244; overflow-y: auto; max-height: 500px;

div.t-if: state.gitStaged.length === 0 and state.gitUnstaged.length === 0 and state.gitUntracked.length === 0 and state.gitOutgoing.length === 0

div.style: min-width: 280px; max-width: 350px; overflow-y: auto; max-height: 500px; border-right: 1px solid #313244; padding-right: 12px;

div.class: d-flex align-items-center py-1 px-1 rounded cursor-pointer

div.style: background: #11111b; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #313244; overflow-x: auto;

table.style: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.4;

td.style: padding: 0 8px; text-align: right; user-select: none; min-width: 40px; color: #45475a; border-right: 1px solid #313244;

t.div: Selecciona un archivo para ver su contenido

div.p: Select a branch from the sidebar to begin.

div.class: position-fixed top-0 start-0 w-100 h-100 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center

div.style: background: #1e1e2e; border: 1px solid #313244; border-radius: 8px; width: 400px; padding: 24px;

div.class: position-fixed top-0 start-0 w-100 h-100 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center
